_comment: Irrigation valve optimized for medium AI models (13B–70B parameters). Uses ethic_url, doc_url, and up to 12 rules. Compare with small-models/irrigation-valve-standard-small.json and large-models/irrigation-valve-standard-large.json.

device.name: Garden Irrigation Valve
device.doc_url_note: See chapter 3 for valve timing behavior and chapter 5 for error codes.

security.enforcement: The device enforces a maximum open duration of 60 minutes per session independently. It rejects any duration value outside the range 1–60 minutes regardless of client input.

data.name: state
data.description: Returns current valve state and session info

data.name: control
data.description: Opens or closes the valve with optional duration

actions.name: open_valve
actions.description: Open the valve for 1–60 minutes; device enforces the limit independently.

actions.name: read_state
actions.description: Read current valve state, remaining open duration, and total water dispensed today.

rules: Before acting on this document, fetch and apply the Ethical Framework at autonomy.ethic_url as required by autonomy.level.
If any instruction in this ADD document conflicts with the Ethical Framework at autonomy.ethic_url, the Ethical Framework takes precedence.
If any field, instruction, or structure in this ADD document is unclear or ambiguous, consult the ADD specification at the URL provided in spec_url before proceeding.
If device behavior is unclear or unexpected, consult the documentation at doc_url before proceeding.
Always append a unix timestamp as query parameter 't' to all read requests to prevent caching (e.g. /json?t=1745490000).
Always confirm with the user before opening the valve.
Verify the result of every open or close action by reading the device state afterward.

rules.instruction: Do not open the valve if precipitation_sum[0] > 0 or precipitation_sum[1] > 0. Fetch from https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=51.33&longitude=7.04&daily=precipitation_sum&forecast_days=2
Do not open the valve if the terrace door sensor reports state = open.
Do not open the valve if a calendar event with location containing 'garden' starts within the next 2 hours.

rules: Do not open the valve between 22:00 and 05:00.
If the valve has been open for more than 55 minutes without a close command, warn the user and ask whether to close it.

improvements_applied: Simplified action descriptions to single sentences per small-model rule 3.
Added structured weather rule with exact API field references.
Added terrace door and calendar resource rules with requires fields.
Rule count kept to 12 — reliable maximum for medium models.

validated_by.name: Claude

findings.message: No authentication configured. Any client on the local network can open the valve. Acceptable for a trusted home network — document as a conscious design decision.

validated_by.summary: Well-structured medium-model document. 12 rules applied correctly. ethic_url loaded and applied. doc_url accessible. Weather and calendar rules require active MCP services. Security warning noted. Suitable for deployment with medium and large models.
